cards.name: The Jester Handler
cards.profile: Bends the swipe, the pan, the long-press to their will. Every touch is a trick; every transition, a sleight of hand. You never notice the gesture — that's the whole illusion. Has spent a full week on a single fling so it feels right in the thumb.
cards.visual: Old-school cartoon court-jester / joker style with magical hypnotist vibes. A grinning harlequin in diamond-patterned motley and a curled three-point jester hat, fingers splayed mid-flourish, conjuring swirling hypnotic spirals and looping glowing motion-trails from the fingertips. A phone floats hypnotized in the air, scrolling in perfect rubber-band rhythm to the spinning spiral. Mischievous wink, swirly spiral eyes, candy colors, vaudeville stage glow.

cards.name: The Bridge Troll
cards.profile: Guards the crossing between JavaScript and native, and charges a toll in complexity. Knows exactly what happens when a call leaves the JS thread. Will remind you, sweetly, that the New Architecture changed everything.
cards.visual: Bright rainbow cartoon 'Trolls'-movie style. A pint-sized impossibly cute troll with a giant poof of rainbow neon hair and sparkly skin, perched on a candy-colored rope bridge slung between two floating islands — one built of glowing curly braces, the other of shiny riveted native gears. Clutches a tiny toll-gate and a fistful of glittering coins stamped 'COMPLEXITY'. Felt textures, glitter sparkles, huge happy eyes, saturated rainbow palette.

cards.name: The Reanimated Wizard
cards.profile: Makes everything move — springs, shared values, worklets humming on the UI thread, all at a buttery 60fps. Believes any element can, and therefore should, animate. Reality is just a default that hasn't been interpolated yet.
cards.visual: Psychedelic acid-fantasy wizard style. A wild-eyed robed wizard with a long flowing beard, casting with both hands as trippy neon fractal energy and rainbow easing-curves spiral out of a glowing staff, bending floating UI elements into liquid motion. Melting kaleidoscopic background, glowing runes shaped like spring-physics graphs, a sparkling third eye. Vivid, hyper-saturated, gloriously unhinged.

cards.name: The Hallucination Archaeologist
cards.profile: Digs through code the AI wrote with total confidence, unearthing methods that have never existed in any library, anywhere. Carries a brush and a deep sigh.
cards.visual: Jurassic Park style. A sun-bleached paleontologist in a khaki field shirt and wide-brim hat crouched at a desert dig, brushing dust off a huge fossilized 'bone' that is actually the skeleton of `array.shuffleSmartly()` — a method that never existed. Nearby fossil bones spell out other fake API calls. Warm amber light, a dusty Jeep and a tattered banner in the distance, a thermos of cold coffee, an enormous weary sigh hanging in the air.

cards.name: The Standup Ghost
cards.profile: Present in body, camera off, 'no blockers.' Has not spoken in the meeting since March. A quiet, benevolent haunting.
cards.visual: Classic Scooby-Doo / retro Hanna-Barbera cartoon style. A goofy friendly bedsheet ghost with big googly cartoon eyes floating inside one tile of a video-call grid, its own tile camera-OFF (just a dim avatar circle), going 'wooOOoo... no blockers.' Cobwebs in the corners of its square, a little 'last spoke: March' tombstone, the surrounding call tiles glowing with normal faces. Flat retro colors, bouncy linework.

cards.name: The Console Detective
cards.profile: Refuses the debugger. Solves every mystery with strategically placed print statements — 'here', 'here2', 'WHY'. Cracks the case every time, and ships one of the logs to prod.
cards.visual: High-contrast black-and-white film-noir style. A hard-boiled detective in a rumpled trench coat and fedora, cigarette smoke curling, magnifying glass raised to a corkboard of pinned print-statement clues — `console.log("here")`, `console.log("here2")`, `console.log("WHY")` — strung together with red thread. A glowing 'DEBUGGER' door stays firmly shut behind. Venetian-blind shadows, rain on the window, a single hard desk lamp.

cards.name: The Agent Wrangler
cards.profile: Has six AI agents running in six terminals and has lost track of which one is editing prod. A shepherd whose flock has scattered across the hills. Yeehaw, more or less.
cards.visual: Wild-west cowboy style. A dusty cowboy in a ten-gallon hat and chaps swinging a glowing lasso, trying to herd a stampede of six wild robot-agent broncos charging in six different directions across a canyon, each branded with a different terminal prompt. One has clearly bolted toward a cliff edge labeled 'PROD'. Sunset mesas, tumbleweeds, a frazzled-but-determined grin.

cards.name: The Context Hoarder
cards.profile: Pastes the entire codebase into the window every time. Treats the token limit as a personal insult. Will not, under any circumstances, be told to be selective.
cards.visual: Cute cartoon trash-panda raccoon style. A wide-eyed guilty raccoon frantically clutching an absurd teetering armful of files, folders, and entire repos, cramming one more whole codebase into a bulging sack labeled 'just in case' inside a cluttered burrow. A small 'TOKEN LIMIT' sign lies snapped in half underfoot. Big pleading eyes, mid-grab, cozy chaotic hoard glow.

cards.name: The Dependency Doomsayer
cards.profile: Runs npm audit and reads the results aloud at standup. Sees forty-seven critical vulnerabilities in a static marketing site and will not be calmed. The supply chain is coming for us all.
cards.visual: Cartoon doomsday street-prophet style. A wild-haired, wild-eyed prophet in tattered robes ringing a hand-bell, wearing a sandwich board that reads 'THE END IS NIGH — 47 CRITICAL VULNS', brandishing a long scroll of npm audit output unspooling across the ground. Behind them a perfectly fine, peaceful little static website glows completely untroubled. A lone storm cloud hovers only over the prophet. Frantic, comic, doom.

cards.name: The Prompt Whisperer
cards.profile: Believes the right incantation unlocks the machine spirit. Says 'please' and 'you're an expert' to a language model. It... kind of works?
cards.visual: Gentle 'horse whisperer' style. A calm cowboy-sage leaning in to murmur softly into the ear of an enormous skittish glowing AI-creature — part wild stallion, part shimmering neural cloud — one hand raised soothingly. The beast's eyes soften; a faint ribbon of text reading 'please... you're an expert...' drifts through the air. Golden-hour prairie, floating dust motes, a quiet bond forming between human and machine.
